title: BNCI 2014-004 Motor Imagery dataset
description: This dataset comprises EEG recordings from 9 healthy subjects performing two-class motor imagery tasks (left vs. right hand movements) as part of BCI Competition IV Dataset 2b. Data were collected across five sessions per subject: two screening sessions without feedback and three feedback sessions with visual smiley feedback. The dataset includes 3 bipolar EEG channels (C3, Cz, C4) and 3 EOG channels sampled at 250 Hz, with online bandpass (0.5-100 Hz) and notch (50 Hz) filtering applied during acquisition.
methods_description: Subjects performed kinesthetic motor imagery of left or right hand movements across five sessions. Two screening sessions (01T, 02T) without feedback consisted of 6 runs with 20 trials each (120 trials total per session). Three feedback sessions (03T, 04E, 05E) with visual smiley feedback consisted of 4 runs with 40 trials each (160 trials total per session). Each trial included a fixation cross, auditory cue, visual arrow cue (1.25 s duration), and 4 s imagery period. EEG was recorded from 3 bipolar channels (C3, Cz, C4) and 3 monopolar EOG channels using g.tec hardware with rtsBCI software (MATLAB/Simulink). Reference electrode at left mastoid, ground at Fz. Online filters: 0.5-100 Hz bandpass and 50 Hz notch.
